name: io.github.khan-ashifur/hooklayer
description: Viral-content intelligence for AI agents. 7 MCP tools for analyzing TikTok creators, scoring hooks, remixing scripts, surfacing live trends, matching creator voice, predicting virality, and finding niche-fit viral templates. Flagship tool analyze_account returns a recommended_chain field that pre-fills the next 3 tool calls — agentic chaining without prompt engineering. Free tier: 100 lifetime credits at signup.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer hl_live_* (free tier signup at https://hooklayer.dev/auth/signup) OR OAuth 2.1 access token (Dynamic Client Registration available at https://hooklayer.dev/oauth/register).
